messages.content:
Question: Which store earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype' across all countries?

Available databases: tracks_database, sales_database

Available schema:
Database: tracks_database (sqlite)
  Table: tracks — track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
Database: sales_database (duckdb)
  Table: sales — sale_id, track_id, country, store, units_sold, revenue_usd

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "query": "SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'", "database": "tracks_database"}

messages.name: query_db
messages.content:
Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_1'] for use in execute_python.
Preview:
[{"track_id": 4122, "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis"}, {"track_id": 4628, "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis"}, {"track_id": 14080, "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis"}]

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"database": "sales_database", "query": "SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC", "query_type": "sql"}

messages.name: query_db
messages.content:
Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_2'] for use in execute_python.
Preview:
[{"store": "iTunes", "total_revenue": 505.61}, {"store": "Amazon Music", "total_revenue": 304.13}, {"store": "Apple Music", "total_revenue": 116.20000000000002}]

question: Which store earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype' across all countries?
